title: Subscription
subtitle: Manage your plan and payment methods

banner.trialing: Your trial ends in {{count}} day(s). Subscribe to keep using all features.
banner.past_due: Payment pending. Write access is suspended. Settle payment to resume.
banner.canceled: Subscription canceled. You will have access until the end of the current period ({{count}} days left).

trial.endsIn: Trial ends in {{count}} day(s). Subscribe to a plan to keep access.
trial.offer: 14 days free · no credit card · cancel anytime

expired.title: Access suspended
expired.description: Your trial period has expired. Choose a plan to keep using AlugaPro.

pastDue.message: Payment failed. Write access suspended. Settle payment to continue.

mobileNote: Payment is processed exclusively on the website to avoid app store fees. If you are on the mobile app, the "Subscribe now" button will open your phone's browser.

toast.affiliateOkDesc: The affiliate commission will activate after the 15-day waiting period.
toast.redirectPayDesc: A new tab was opened for you to complete payment.
toast.invalidDocument: Enter a valid CPF or CNPJ.

demoDescription: This account has full Business plan access for sales demos. Real charges do not apply.
confirmDocumentDesc: We need the CPF (individual) or CNPJ (company) to generate the charge. This is only asked once.
